notes: Use these presets as fetch-and-freeze starting points for governed evidence ingestion.
GraceDB is strongest for low-latency analyst workflow context when the object is publicly accessible.
GWOSC is strongest for released, versioned public event metadata and should be preferred for archival reproducibility.

gracedb.name: S190425z
gracedb.description: Validated public GraceDB superevent with labels, logs, files, and VOEvents.
gracedb.command: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe gracedb_snapshot_importer.py --superevent-id S190425z --force-noauth --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest --evidence-only

gracedb.name: S241110br
gracedb.description: GraceDB superevent referenced by the GWOSC released event GW241110_124123-v1; unauthenticated event access may still vary by endpoint.
gracedb.command: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe gracedb_snapshot_importer.py --superevent-id S241110br --force-noauth --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest --evidence-only

gwosc.name: GW241110_124123-v1
gwosc.description: Versioned GWOSC event metadata with catalog/run IDs, GraceDB linkage, detector set, DOI, and follow-on URLs for parameters, timelines, and strain-file inventories.

gwosc.name: GW190425_081805-v1
gwosc.description: GWOSC released event associated with the publicly validated S190425z superevent.
